author: Cao Nhựt Minh
tmdl_source:
createOrReplace

	model Model
		culture: en-US
		defaultPowerBIDataSourceVersion: powerBI_V3
		sourceQueryCulture: en-US
		dataAccessOptions
			legacyRedirects
			returnErrorValuesAsNull

		table '.dax'
			lineageTag: fe2c9772-ffed-4486-b333-b66fe55724ec

			measure in_opening_00 = ```
					
					// VAR _min = MIN(dim_calendar_1[Date])
					// RETURN
					// CALCULATE(
					//         [closing], 
					//         dim_calendar_1[Date] = _min-1
					//     )  
					
					VAR _min = MIN(dim_calendar_1[Date])
					VAR motthangmot =
					    CALCULATE(
					        SUM('fact_RCN'[Total Output Qty.]),
					        FILTER(
					            'fact_RCN',
					            'fact_RCN'[TransactionType] = "Opening"
					        ))
					var OTHER =
					        CALCULATE(
					        [out_closing_00],
					        dim_calendar_1[Date] = _min-1
					    )  
					return --OTHER
					   IF(
					    MONTH(_MIN) = 1 && DAY(_min) = 1 && YEAR(_min), motthangmot,
					    OTHER)
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: 2f2e2be8-e3ab-4f2d-abd0-9efb4661c56b

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure in_00 =
					
					CALCULATE(
					    SUM('fact_RCN'[Total Output Qty.]),
					    'fact_RCN'[MODE] = "IN" && NOT('fact_RCN'[TransactionType] IN {"Opening"})
					)
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: 9596d91c-e805-4f52-8996-552d8f9589de

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isDecimal":true}

			measure out_00 = ```
					
					    CALCULATE(
					        SUM('fact_RCN'[Total Output Qty.]),
					        'fact_RCN'[MODE] = "OUT"
					    )
					    
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: e4e3a11f-e850-4b5d-93e5-226f098d8ebd

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isDecimal":true}

			measure out_closing_00 = ```
					
					// VAR YTD_in = TOTALYTD([in], dim_calendar_1[Date])
					// VAR YTD_out = TOTALYTD([out],dim_calendar_1[Date])
					// VAR Fix_num = CALCULATE(SUM(closing_data[closing]),'closing_data'[fact] = 0 ) 
					// RETURN 
					// IF(max(dim_calendar_1[YearMonth]) < 202512 , Fix_num ,  -YTD_out+YTD_in + Fix_num)
					
					VAR YTD_in = TOTALYTD( 
					                        CALCULATE(
					                            SUM('fact_RCN'[Total Output Qty.]),
					                            FILTER('fact_RCN','fact_RCN'[MODE] = "IN" && NOT('fact_RCN'[TransactionType] IN {"Transfer"})   )
					                        )
					    , dim_calendar_1[Date])
					VAR YTD_out = TOTALYTD([out_00],dim_calendar_1[Date])
					RETURN -YTD_out+YTD_in
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: 6902d99c-fb0d-4a7b-91f9-fedcacfb6a4b

			measure out_loss_00 = ```
					
					COALESCE(
					CALCULATE(
					    SUM('fact_RCN'[Total Output Qty.]),
					     'fact_RCN'[MODE] = "OUT", fact_RCN[TransactionType] = "Adjustment"
					    ),0)
					
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: 51498e17-1aba-4586-85f9-e31db29d3368

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure out_consumption_00 = ```
					
					COALESCE(
					CALCULATE( 
					    sum('fact_RCN'[Total Output Qty.]),  
					    'fact_RCN'[MODE] = "OUT", fact_RCN[TransactionType] = "Next process" 
					    ),0)
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: a92c58e5-9a29-4ecb-8b1e-3bbf46331dac

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure in_import_00 =
					
					COALESCE(
					    CALCULATE(
					        SUM('fact_RCN'[Total Output Qty.]),
					        'fact_RCN'[TransactionType] IN {"Domestic", "Import"}
					     ),0)
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: c0ddf91f-9d64-453c-891f-214fb47e73e1

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure in_other_00 = ```
					[in_00]-[in_import_00]
					
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: 5f0e928e-0309-4bdd-92e2-885ebb4845bd

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure out_other_00 = [out_00]-[out_consumption_00]-[out_loss_00]
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: 20f62e63-f115-4ae2-90c4-bb9a43c206df

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure filter_chart_stock_RCN = IF([out_closing_00] = 0  && [in_opening_00] = 0 && [in_import_00] = 0 , 0 , 1 )
				formatString: 0
				displayFolder: Stock_RCN
				lineageTag: 2e1bb842-efbf-4748-8c8c-19a4c0c87ce6

			measure in_opening_01 = ```
					
					// VAR _min = MIN(dim_calendar_1[Date])
					// RETURN
					// CALCULATE(
					//         [closing], 
					//         dim_calendar_1[Date] = _min-1
					//     )  
					
					VAR _min = MIN(dim_calendar_1[Date])
					VAR motthangmot =
					    CALCULATE(
					        SUM('fact_Calibration'[Total Output Qty.]),
					        FILTER(
					            'fact_Calibration',
					            'fact_Calibration'[TransactionType] = "Opening"
					        ))
					var OTHER =
					        CALCULATE(
					        [out_closing_01],
					        dim_calendar_1[Date] = _min-1
					    )  
					return --OTHER
					   IF(
					    MONTH(_MIN) = 1 && DAY(_min) = 1 && YEAR(_min), motthangmot,
					    OTHER)
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: d1d3b822-09af-4ef3-aa7c-394eca96291c

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure out_closing_01 = ```
					
					// VAR YTD_in = TOTALYTD([in], dim_calendar_1[Date])
					// VAR YTD_out = TOTALYTD([out],dim_calendar_1[Date])
					// VAR Fix_num = CALCULATE(SUM(closing_data[closing]),'closing_data'[fact] = 0 ) 
					// RETURN 
					// IF(max(dim_calendar_1[YearMonth]) < 202512 , Fix_num ,  -YTD_out+YTD_in + Fix_num)
					
					VAR YTD_in = TOTALYTD( 
					                        CALCULATE(
					                            SUM('fact_Calibration'[Total Output Qty.]),
					                            FILTER('fact_Calibration','fact_Calibration'[MODE] = "IN" && NOT('fact_Calibration'[TransactionType] IN {"Transfer"})   )
					                        )
					    , dim_calendar_1[Date])
					VAR YTD_out = TOTALYTD([out_01],dim_calendar_1[Date])
					RETURN -YTD_out+YTD_in
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: c9275fff-6626-47ce-8f41-000768a04755

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure out_consumption_01 = ```
					
					COALESCE(
					CALCULATE( 
					    sum('fact_Calibration'[Total Output Qty.]),  
					    'fact_Calibration'[MODE] = "OUT", fact_Calibration[TransactionType] = "Next process" 
					),0)
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: 16c21fc9-bfbb-4568-ae8e-98effce0c517

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure in_arrival_01 =
					
					COALESCE(
					CALCULATE(
					    SUM('fact_Calibration'[Total Output Qty.]),
					    fact_Calibration[MODE] = "IN", fact_Calibration[TransactionType]= "Next Process"
					),0)
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: f7988445-b59d-4a55-af5a-ac7a3067f451

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure in_01 = ```
					
					    CALCULATE(
					        SUM('fact_Calibration'[Total Output Qty.]),
					        'fact_Calibration'[MODE] = "IN" && NOT('fact_Calibration'[TransactionType] IN {"Opening"})   
					)
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: c559f5aa-8cda-4fb2-b8d3-9bc1d481e9da

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure in_other_01 = ```
					[in_01]-[in_arrival_01]
					
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: 7f2c7bbb-aeaf-432f-870a-a35b41d47615

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure out_loss_01 = ```
					
					COALESCE(
					CALCULATE(
					    SUM('fact_Calibration'[Total Output Qty.]),
					     'fact_Calibration'[MODE] = "OUT", fact_Calibration[TransactionType] = "Adjustment"
					),0)
					
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: da554573-d190-4dd6-80c9-c7b66a72987e

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure out_01 = ```
					
					CALCULATE(
					    SUM('fact_Calibration'[Total Output Qty.]),
					    'fact_Calibration'[MODE] = "OUT"
					)
					    
					```
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: ff18c490-8dff-4887-b6c1-af5abc8634ab

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure out_other_01 = [out_01]-[out_consumption_01]-[out_loss_01]
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: 16839b2b-25ba-4fa1-b123-22ff64da372e

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure filter_chart_stock_Calibration = IF([out_closing_01] = 0  && [in_opening_01] = 0 && [in_arrival_01] = 0 , 0 , 1 )
				formatString: 0
				displayFolder: Stock_Calibration
				lineageTag: 25a973fd-b6ba-42e7-a1dd-31c85558f1e8

			measure 'RCN Stock' = ```
					
					VAR D2=  [Start Date]
					
					RETURN
					//if( SELECTEDVALUE(dim_calendar_1[Date]) <> blank()  ,
					if([sum 2 opening] = blank() , blank(), 
					CALCULATE([sum 2 opening] , dim_calendar_1[Date] = D2) // + [YTD LAG RCN Stock and Production planning]
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: 354f7948-fce9-4b4a-8cac-f8974c359432

			measure 'End stock' = ```
					
					VAR D2=  [Start Date]
					RETURN
					if([sum 2 opening] = blank(), blank(), 
					CALCULATE([sum 2 opening] , dim_calendar_1[Date] = D2)  + [YTD RCN Stock and Production planning] 
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: ae708e4e-68f2-423b-aec6-e6875f6ed3b6

			measure 'RCN Arrival (+)' = sum(Procurement_Demand[Shipped_Qty])
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: ec0f71a2-677e-434f-927a-ff0cf06b0ea2

			measure 'Production (-)' =
					sum('Production_planning'[Production_Per_Day]) / 1000
					//CALCULATE( sum('Production_planning'[Production_Per_Day]), FILTER(dim_calendar_1,dim_calendar_1[Date] >= TODAY() ))
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: 50eaece9-cfbe-4c23-9eda-c67807036312

			measure 'YTD LAG RCN Stock and Production planning' =
					
					VAR StartDate = CALCULATE(MIN('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),ALLSELECTED('dim_calendar_1'))
					VAR CurrentDate = MAX('dim_calendar_1'[Date])
					VAR LagDate =     CurrentDate - 1
					RETURN
					IF (CurrentDate < StartDate,BLANK(),
					    CALCULATE(COALESCE([RCN Arrival (+)] - [Production (-)],0)  ,
					        FILTER(ALL('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),
					            'dim_calendar_1'[Date] >= StartDate
					                && 'dim_calendar_1'[Date] <= LagDate
					        )
					    )
					)
					// lũy kế , động theo giá trị slicer, nếu slicer chọn trúng ngày blank thì lũy kế tính từ 0, tính trễ một ngày, để cộng vào cho RCN stock
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: 9ebd5cc9-bf0c-41ad-afd4-8856ff0c8942

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure TAZ = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(), 
					CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Tanzania" ))
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: 59fa3d6f-2408-41b7-be65-8e7cd495da4f

			measure IND = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(), 
					CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Indonesia" )
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: fbcdffd6-2924-45c1-a0f9-2ee1936fa864

			measure NIG = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(), 
					CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Nigeria" )
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: afe5473b-39cc-42d1-996b-06dd2338affd

			measure GHN = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(), 
					 CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Ghana" )
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: 3fded3c4-de50-489a-a2dd-97cbe219a66a

			measure IVC = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(), 
					CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Ivc" )
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: 872154d2-807e-4622-89bd-90400de5ddd4

			measure CON = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(),  
					CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Conakry" )
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: 671d6f0e-000a-45b2-bf4a-59e8aef82d50

			measure BIS = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(),  
					CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Bissau" )
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: b19617a4-a504-4c4a-a11b-819c9daff347

			measure SEN = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(), 
					CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Senegal" )
					
					
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: 27cfb427-f6e9-4efd-9780-485497b219c5

			measure Text_box = ```
					
					 var x = IF(HASONEVALUE(sort_plant[Destination]), SELECTEDVALUE(sort_plant[Destination]),"ICC")
					 VAR y = IF(FORMAT(TODAY(),"ddd") =  "Mon" , TODAY() - 2, TODAY() - 1 ) // do thứ hai là ngoại lệ phải trả về 2 ngày trước
					 RETURN
					 "Latest RCN Stock's " & X &" up to " & FORMAT(y,"dd/mmm/yyyy") 
					 // đây là logic đã bàn với Cường, luôn nhìn tới today -1 (hoặc -2) 
					 // do user chỉ quan tâm ngày gần nhất mà ko quan tâm quá khứ nên ngày ở đây sẽ bị fix cứng
					```
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: 85b32712-1db8-4727-ada8-9836f55acd50

			measure 'sum 2 opening' = ([in_opening_00]  +  [in_opening_01]) /1000
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: 1cfa951a-1882-4cb6-9832-c0ac66bc6407

			measure 'Start Date' =
					
					VAR MinDateSelected =
					    CALCULATE(
					        MIN('dim_calendar_2'[Date]),
					        ALLSELECTED('dim_calendar_2')
					    )
					RETURN
					    MIN( MinDateSelected, TODAY() )
				formatString: General Date
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: 3499fcf5-d176-4fc9-9a0d-ee8903239f02

			measure 'YTD RCN Stock and Production planning' =
					
					VAR StartDate = CALCULATE(MIN('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),ALLSELECTED('dim_calendar_1'))
					VAR CurrentDate = MAX('dim_calendar_1'[Date])
					RETURN
					IF (CurrentDate < StartDate,BLANK(),
					    CALCULATE(COALESCE([RCN Arrival (+)] - [Production (-)],0)  ,
					        FILTER(ALL('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),
					            'dim_calendar_1'[Date] >= StartDate
					                && 'dim_calendar_1'[Date] <= CurrentDate
					        )
					    )
					)
					// lũy kế , động theo giá trị slicer, nếu slicer chọn trúng ngày blank thì lũy kế tính từ 0, để cộng vào cho End stock
				displayFolder: Production & Demand
				lineageTag: 788ac6a5-25ab-43b6-b7e2-844ce04b0b16

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure 'RCN Stock sum' = ```
					
					VAR StartDate = CALCULATE(MIN('dim_calendar_2'[Date]),ALLSELECTED('dim_calendar_2'))
					VAR CurrentDate =  MAX('dim_calendar_1'[Date])
					-- Ngày đầu của context hiện tại (Week / Month / Year)
					VAR FirstDateOfPeriod =    MIN(dim_calendar_1[Date])- 1   
					RETURN
					if([sum 2 opening] = blank() , blank(), CALCULATE([sum 2 opening] , dim_calendar_1[Date] = StartDate ) ) 
					+
					IF(
					    ISINSCOPE('dim_calendar_1'[Date]), -- ✅ Level Date → chạy bình thường
					    IF (CurrentDate < StartDate, BLANK(),
					        CALCULATE ( COALESCE([RCN Arrival (+)] - [Production (-)],0),
					            FILTER ( ALL('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),'dim_calendar_1'[Date] >= StartDate && 'dim_calendar_1'[Date] <= CurrentDate-1  )
					        )
					    ),
					    -- ✅ Level cao hơn → tính tại ngày đầu period
					    CALCULATE(
					        VAR d = FirstDateOfPeriod
					        RETURN
					            IF ( d < StartDate, BLANK(),
					                CALCULATE ( COALESCE([RCN Arrival (+)] - [Production (-)],0),
					                    FILTER ( ALL('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),'dim_calendar_1'[Date] >= StartDate && 'dim_calendar_1'[Date] <= d   )
					                )
					            )
					           ,REMOVEFILTERS('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),
					       'dim_calendar_1'[Date] = FirstDateOfPeriod
					    )
					)
					
					
					
					//Hàm này phức tạp lắm á nha ^^ 
					// Logic là Sumx của đống Sum 2 opening theo từng dòng + Sumx của kết quả lũy kế động.
					// Báo cáo này có require là, khi chọn 1 ngày thì trả về Opening trong data ONEMIS, ở dòng đầu tiên thôi,sau đó lấy cái kết quả opening đó, + RCN Arrival - Production, để ra End Stock còn lại. thì ngày kế tiếp lấy Openng sẽ là End Stock của dòng trên
					```
				formatString: #,0
				lineageTag: 244067c1-ff6f-4897-beab-d95465c2ac61

			measure 'End Stock sum' = ```
					
					VAR StartDate = CALCULATE(MIN('dim_calendar_2'[Date]),ALLSELECTED('dim_calendar_2'))
					VAR D2 = [Start Date]
					VAR CurrentDate =  MAX('dim_calendar_1'[Date])
					-- Ngày đầu của context hiện tại (Week / Month / Year)
					VAR LastDateOfPeriod =    MAX('dim_calendar_1'[Date])
					RETURN
					if([sum 2 opening] = blank() , blank(), CALCULATE([sum 2 opening] , dim_calendar_1[Date] = StartDate ) ) 
					+
					IF(
					    ISINSCOPE('dim_calendar_1'[Date]), -- ✅ Level Date → chạy bình thường
					    IF (CurrentDate < StartDate, BLANK(),
					        CALCULATE ( COALESCE([RCN Arrival (+)] - [Production (-)],0),
					            FILTER ( ALL('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),'dim_calendar_1'[Date] >= StartDate && 'dim_calendar_1'[Date] <= CurrentDate  )
					        )
					    ),
					    -- ✅ Level cao hơn → tính tại ngày đầu period
					    CALCULATE(
					        VAR d = LastDateOfPeriod
					        RETURN
					            IF ( d < StartDate, BLANK(),
					                CALCULATE ( COALESCE([RCN Arrival (+)] - [Production (-)],0),
					                    FILTER ( ALL('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),
					                        'dim_calendar_1'[Date] >= StartDate &&
					                        'dim_calendar_1'[Date] <= d
					                    )
					                )
					            ),
					        REMOVEFILTERS('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),
					        'dim_calendar_1'[Date] = LastDateOfPeriod
					    )
					)
					```
				formatString: #,0
				lineageTag: c91b9244-adf2-4b2b-821e-22c524c76c5f

			measure 'Filter week or month' = ```
					
					var X = CALCULATE(MIN(dim_calendar_1[Week]), ALLSELECTED(dim_calendar_1))
					VAR Y = CALCULATE(MIN(dim_calendar_1[Date]), ALLSELECTED(dim_calendar_1))
					VAR minus_week  = MIN(dim_calendar_1[Week]) - x 
					var minus_Month = DATEDIFF( Y,MIN(dim_calendar_1[Date]), MONTH )
					RETURN
					if(SELECTEDVALUE(Dim_Term[ID]) = 0, minus_week, minus_Month )
					
					```
				formatString: 0
				lineageTag: 75026fe5-4738-4288-bb20-8ebda418bc80

			measure 'Color SUM' =
					
					IF(SELECTEDVALUE(dim_calendar_1[Date]) = today(), 1,
					 IF([End Stock sum] < 0 , -1, 0 ))
				formatString: 0
				lineageTag: 728230b3-a9d9-4356-873c-97fa58973e64

			measure CAM = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(), 
					CALCULATE([RCN Arrival (+)],dim_origin[Origin] = "Cambodia" )
					)
					```
				displayFolder: Production & Demand\_Origin
				lineageTag: e4f2d231-16f2-4eef-8e18-c9059e3908a2

				annotation PBI_FormatHint = {"isGeneralNumber":true}

			measure VTN = ```
					if( NOT(ISINSCOPE(dim_calendar_1[Year - Month - Week])), BLANK(),

			measure 'Test min' = ```
					
					VAR StartDate = CALCULATE(MIN('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),ALLSELECTED('dim_calendar_1'))
					VAR D2 = [Start Date]
					VAR CurrentDate =  MAX('dim_calendar_1'[Date])
					-- Ngày đầu của context hiện tại (Week / Month / Year)
					VAR FirstDateOfPeriod =    MIN('dim_calendar_1'[Date])-1
					RETURN
					if([sum 2 opening] = blank() , blank(), CALCULATE([sum 2 opening] , dim_calendar_1[Date] = StartDate ) ) 
					+
					IF(
					    ISINSCOPE('dim_calendar_1'[Date]), -- ✅ Level Date → chạy bình thường
					    IF (CurrentDate < StartDate, BLANK(),
					        CALCULATE ( COALESCE([RCN Arrival (+)] - [Production (-)],0),
					            FILTER ( ALL('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),'dim_calendar_1'[Date] >= StartDate && 'dim_calendar_1'[Date] <= CurrentDate-1  )
					        )
					    ),
					    -- ✅ Level cao hơn → tính tại ngày đầu period
					    CALCULATE(
					        VAR d = FirstDateOfPeriod
					        RETURN
					            IF ( d < StartDate, BLANK(),
					                CALCULATE ( COALESCE([RCN Arrival (+)] - [Production (-)],0),
					                    FILTER ( ALL('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),
					                        'dim_calendar_1'[Date] >= StartDate &&
					                        'dim_calendar_1'[Date] <= d
					                    )
					                )
					            ),
					        REMOVEFILTERS('dim_calendar_1'[Date]),
					        'dim_calendar_1'[Date] = FirstDateOfPeriod
					    )
					)
					```

			partition dim_calendar_2 = calculated
				mode: import
				source = ```
						
						ADDCOLUMNS (
						    CALENDAR ( MIN(fact_RCN[Date]), date(YEAR(MAX(fact_RCN[Date])),12,31 ) ),
						    "Year", YEAR ( [Date] ),
						    "Month Num", MONTH ( [Date] ),
						    "Month", FORMAT ( [Date], "MMMM" ),
						    "Short Month", LEFT ( FORMAT ( [Date], "MMMM" ), 3 ),
						    "Year Filter", IF ( YEAR ( [Date] ) = YEAR ( TODAY () ), "This Year", FORMAT ( YEAR ( [Date] ), "0000" ) ),
						    "YearMonth", YEAR ( [Date] ) * 100 + MONTH ( [Date] ),
						    "Month_Label", IF(
						        MONTH([Date]) = MONTH(TODAY()) && YEAR([Date]) = YEAR(TODAY()),
						        "This Month",
						        FORMAT([Date], "MMMM")
						    ),
						    "Day Filter", IF (  [Date]  <  TODAY () , blank(),  FORMAT([Date], "dd/mmm/yyyy") ),
						    "Week", WEEKNUM ( [Date], 1 ),
						    "WeekDay", WEEKDAY([Date]),
						    "Working Date", IF(WEEKDAY([Date])=1, "No", "Yes"),
						    "Day Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "ddd" ),
						    "YearMonthDay", YEAR ( [Date] ) * 10000 + MONTH ( [Date] ) * 100 +  DAY( [Date])
						)
						
						```

			annotation PBI_Id = c2ac010c77624f91867180e6b541507e

			partition dim_calendar_1 = calculated
				mode: import
				source = ```
						
						ADDCOLUMNS (
						    CALENDAR ( MIN(fact_RCN[Date]), date(YEAR(MAX(fact_RCN[Date])),12,31 )),
						    "Year", YEAR ( [Date] ),
						    "Month Num", MONTH ( [Date] ),
						    "Month", FORMAT ( [Date], "MMMM" ),
						    "Short Month", LEFT ( FORMAT ( [Date], "MMMM" ), 3 ),
						    "Year Filter", IF ( YEAR ( [Date] ) = YEAR ( TODAY () ), "This Year", FORMAT ( YEAR ( [Date] ), "0000" ) ),
						    "Year/Month",  FORMAT ( [Date], "YYYY/MMM" ),
						    "YearMonth", YEAR ( [Date] ) * 100 + MONTH ( [Date] ),
						    "Month_Label", IF(
						        MONTH([Date]) = MONTH(TODAY()) && YEAR([Date]) = YEAR(TODAY()),
						        "This Month",
						        FORMAT([Date], "MMMM")
						    ),
						    "Week", WEEKNUM ( [Date], 1 ),
						    "WeekDay", WEEKDAY([Date]),
						    "Working Date", IF(WEEKDAY([Date])=1, "No", "Yes"),
						    "Day Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "ddd" ),
						    "YearMonthDay", YEAR ( [Date] ) * 10000 + MONTH ( [Date] ) * 100 +  DAY( [Date])
						)
						
						```

			partition 'Date update' = calculated

						Var x =  SUMMARIZE( ADDCOLUMNS(fact_RCN,"Place",UPPER(fact_RCN[Plant])) ,[Place], "datemax", MAX(fact_RCN[Date]))

		expression SourceSQL = ```
				let
				        Source = Sql.Database("VNICC-DB002-MIS", "ICC-MIS"),
				    dbo_VW_F_TRANSACTION = Source{[Schema="dbo",Item="VW_F_TRANSACTION"]}[Data],
				    //#"Replaced Value" = Table.ReplaceValue(dbo_VW_F_TRANSACTION,"NULL",null,Replacer.ReplaceValue,{"TransactionID", "Factory", "DateID", "TransactionType", "RefITN", "Location_From", "Section_From", "Location_To", "Section_To", "BL_No", "ProductionLot", "PackingLot", "PackingDateID", "ProductionOrigin", "PackingOrigin", "Supplier", "TruckNo", "ContNo", "SealNo", "TruckIn", "TruckOut", "NoOfBags", "BagWt", "PaperWt", "DryBagWt", "RCNNetWt", "BLWt", "AdjustmentType", "AdjustmentQuantity", "Size", "SizeWiseWt", "ProductStatus", "ProductType", "InputGrade", "FinalGrade", "PackingType", "NumberOfPack", "WeightOfPack", "ProductQuantity", "SaleContractNo", "ReworkIDNo", "InterTransferIDNo", "Remark1", "GradeVersion", "Remark4", "Status", "TransactionMode"}),
				    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(dbo_VW_F_TRANSACTION,{{"TransactionID", Int64.Type}, {"Factory", type text}, {"DateID", Int64.Type}, {"TransactionType", type text}, {"Section_To", type text}, {"Location_From", type text}, {"Section_From", type text}, {"Location_To", type text}, {"BL_No", type text}, {"RefITN", type text}, {"ProductionLot", type text}, {"PackingLot", type text}, {"PackingDateID", Int64.Type}, {"ProductionOrigin", type text}, {"PackingOrigin", type text}, {"Supplier", type text}, {"TruckNo", type text}, {"ContNo", type text}, {"SealNo", type text}, {"TruckIn", type number}, {"TruckOut", type number}, {"NoOfBags", Int64.Type}, {"BagWt", type number}, {"PaperWt", type number}, {"DryBagWt", type number}, {"RCNNetWt", type number}, {"BLWt", type number}, {"AdjustmentType", type text}, {"AdjustmentQuantity", type number}, {"Size", type text}, {"SizeWiseWt", type number}, {"ProductStatus", type text}, {"ProductType", type text}, {"InputGrade", type text}, {"FinalGrade", type text}, {"PackingType", type text}, {"NumberOfPack", type number}, {"WeightOfPack", type number}, {"ProductQuantity", type number}, {"SaleContractNo", type text}, {"ReworkIDNo", type text}, {"InterTransferIDNo", type text}, {"Remark1", type text}, {"GradeVersion", type text}, {"Remark4", type text}, {"Status", type text}, {"TransactionMode", type text}}),
				    #"Trimmed Text" = Table.TransformColumns(#"Changed Type",{{"Factory", Text.Trim, type text}, {"TransactionType", Text.Trim, type text}, {"RefITN", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Location_From", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Section_From", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Location_To", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Section_To", Text.Trim, type text}, {"BL_No", Text.Trim, type text}, {"ProductionLot", Text.Trim, type text}, {"PackingLot", Text.Trim, type text}, {"ProductionOrigin", Text.Trim, type text}, {"PackingOrigin", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Supplier", Text.Trim, type text}, {"TruckNo", Text.Trim, type text}, {"ContNo", Text.Trim, type text}, {"SealNo", Text.Trim, type text}, {"AdjustmentType", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Size", Text.Trim, type text}, {"ProductStatus", Text.Trim, type text}, {"ProductType", Text.Trim, type text}, {"InputGrade", Text.Trim, type text}, {"FinalGrade", Text.Trim, type text}, {"PackingType", Text.Trim, type text}, {"SaleContractNo", Text.Trim, type text}, {"ReworkIDNo", Text.Trim, type text}, {"InterTransferIDNo", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Remark1", Text.Trim, type text}, {"GradeVersion", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Remark4", Text.Trim, type text}, {"Status", Text.Trim, type text}, {"TransactionMode", Text.Trim, type text}}),
				    #"Added Section" = Table.AddColumn(#"Trimmed Text", "Section", each if ([Section_From]="CALIBRATION" and [TransactionType]="Adjustment") then "CALIBRATION" else if [TransactionMode] = "IN" then [Section_To] else [Section_From]),
				    // Factory = nơi người input, còn WareHouseName = Plant
				    #"Added Warehouse Name" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Section", "Warehouse Name", each if 
				[TransactionType] = "Opening" and [Location_To] = null then [Factory] 
				else if [TransactionType] = "Opening" and [Location_To] <> null then [Location_To]
				else if[TransactionType] = "Import" then [Location_To]
				else if [TransactionType] = "Adjustment" then [Location_To]
				else if [TransactionType] = "Transfer" and [TransactionMode] = "OUT" then [Location_From]
				else if [TransactionType] = "Transfer" and [TransactionMode] = "IN" then [Location_To]
				else if [TransactionType] = "Sale" then [Location_From]
				else if [TransactionMode] = "IN" then [Location_From] 
				else if [TransactionMode] = "OUT" then [Location_To] else null),
				    #"Date column" = Table.AddColumn(
				    #"Added Warehouse Name",
				    "Date",
				    each try #date(
				        Number.FromText(Text.Start(Text.From([DateID]), 4)),
				        Number.FromText(Text.Middle(Text.From([DateID]), 4, 2)),
				        Number.FromText(Text.End(Text.From([DateID]), 2))
				    ) otherwise null,
				    type date
				),
				    #"Packing Date column" = Table.AddColumn(
				    #"Date column",
				    "Packing_Date",
				    each try 
				#date(
				        Number.FromText(Text.Start(Text.From([PackingDateID]), 4)),
				        Number.FromText(Text.Middle(Text.From([PackingDateID]), 4, 2)),
				        Number.FromText(Text.End(Text.From([PackingDateID]), 2))
				    ) otherwise null ,
				    type date
				),
				    // Do Packing + FG nhập trực tiếp bằng excel nên ko check được rule. 
				    #"Capitalized Each Word" = Table.TransformColumns(#"Packing Date column",{{"ProductionOrigin", Text.Proper, type text}, {"PackingOrigin", Text.Proper, type text}}),
				    Custom1 = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Capitalized Each Word",each [ProductionOrigin], each if [ProductionOrigin] = null then [PackingOrigin] else [ProductionOrigin],Replacer.ReplaceValue,{"ProductionOrigin"}),
				    Custom2 = Table.ReplaceValue(Custom1,each [ProductionLot], each if [ProductionLot] = null then [ReworkIDNo] else [ProductionLot],Replacer.ReplaceValue,{"ProductionLot"})
				in
				    Custom2
				```
